name: Koyeb
description: Serverless cloud platform for deploying apps globally. Monitor infrastructure.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Koyeb at https://app.koyeb.com
2. Go to Account Settings -> API
3. Create a new API token
4. Copy and enter it below

credentialFields.label: API Token
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Koyeb Control Panel -> Account Settings -> API

checks.name: Koyeb App Availability
checks.description: Checks that the Koyeb API is accessible with the provided credentials.

checks.name: Koyeb Employee Access
checks.description: Verifies employee access to Koyeb via API.
